description_long: This is a cylindrical lotion container with a smooth, white body and a prominent blue cap. The front features the brand name 'illuma' in gold lettering, accompanied by a large, stylized droplet graphic filled with yellow and orange spheres, suggesting a premium or specialized formula. The cap appears to be a screw-on type, providing a secure seal for the contents. On one side, there is a large numeral '1' in orange, along with a stroller icon and placeholder text, indicating it may be intended for infants or young children. The back of the container is covered with dense, gray placeholder text, likely representing product information or instructions. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on clarity and visual appeal.
description: A white cylindrical lotion container with a blue screw-on cap, gold 'illuma' branding, and a large droplet graphic on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'illuma' brand, droplet graphic, orange '1', and stroller icon.
description_view_1: Side view with partial brand text and the orange '1' visible, blue cap prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying dense gray placeholder text covering most of the surface, blue cap visible.
description_view_3: Side view with the edge of the droplet graphic and the start of the gray text, blue cap visible.
attribute_packaging_graphics: droplet graphic with yellow and orange spheres
